caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey and white baseball cap with a circular logo, and over-ear headphones is seated in a studio with dark, sound-dampening foam walls. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a boom arm, which features a "Blue" logo. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. He begins by moving his right arm across his chest toward the microphone, then shifts his gestures to his left side, lifting his left arm and moving his hand in the air. A tattoo is visible on his left upper arm. The camera angle remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up as he continues to talk and express himself with hand motions while remaining centered in front of the recording equipment.
